arc: R4t replay-repair reflight: per-vintage .pat synthesis + lwpolyline elevation carry + orphan-def sweep
registered_at_local: 2026-07-10T14:0x (file mtime is the binding evidence of pre-registration order; committed BEFORE launch)

prediction.ceiling_note: 27,123 is the theoretical ceiling: 27,130 minus the 7 loops real-geometry pairs this reflight does NOT repair. The band is deliberately asymmetric (center == ceiling) because every repair is additive.

decomposition.mechanism: patch_engine._synthesize_batch_pat_files now keys .pat by (NAME, zero-phase content digest) under pats/<digest>/<NAME>.pat; every hatch replays its OWN census rows
decomposition.evidence: engine cache probe PASS (runs/pat_vintage_probe_20260710: two same-name vintages in ONE accoreconsole batch session round-tripped to their own row sets X=[0.7854,2.3562], PLUS=[1.5708,3.1416]); the 154 pairs' only changed canonical key was pattern_definitions

decomposition.mechanism: blocks.py _common_vertex_z -> entity.elevation; m08e lwpolyline branch setElevation (native rebuild exit 0)
decomposition.evidence: R4s dissection: all 25 pairs differ only in vertex z 0.4010621945564553 -> 0.0

decomposition.mechanism: ir_to_patch emits every non-*D census def after the entity stream (4 defs never reachable via INSERTs: DIMDOT, _ArchTick, $0$ins-l, $0$ng)
decomposition.evidence: kinds all representable (DIMDOT line1+lw2, _ArchTick lw1, ins-l lw1, ng wipeout2+blockref1+line20); wipeout cert-proven, nested blockref target present in census

prediction.band_rationale: floor 27,105 absorbs partial failures in the sweep family (ng nested blockref ordering, wipeout edge cases) and small flight-to-flight noise; H3/lwpolyline families are deterministic mechanism repairs verified by probe/dissection. Any landing BELOW 27,105 is a FAIL to investigate, not to rename.

guards: adjudicated by tools/remeasure_interior.py: name-map authenticity, LEX-0006 population identity (294 defs / 27,130 ents), per-def no-regression vs R4s, prereg band

population_pin.required: census in the NEW run dir must reproduce 294 defs / 27,130 entities; identity.json sha must equal the pin (LEX-0006)
